arcane_mastery.title: Achieve mastery in 3 Iron's Spellbooks spell schools (9 schools available: evocation, holy, ice, lightning, blood, ender, fire, nature, necromancy)

max_ring.title: Equip a fully upgraded Ring of Recovery and Ring of Mana (Iron's Spellbooks — maximum regeneration rates)

subtitle.text: The spellbook is a continuation of every tool you have ever used. It is just faster.

description: Iron's Spellbooks has 9 schools of magic:
- Fire: burning, explosions (synergy with Ch06 boiler theme)
The Ironbound Tome is the master spell carrier — holds your active spells.
Ring of Recovery: health regeneration between spells.
Ring of Mana: mana regeneration for sustained casting.
By Ch17, three schools at mastery is the minimum.
Your Ch06 investment in the Fire school pays off here.
The Ender school synergizes with your End traversal training.
→ Equip max Ring of Recovery + Ring of Mana [check]
